mapper.update: UPDATE topic_file SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE file_id = #{fileId}
mapper.select: SELECT tf.file_id, tf.topic_id, tf.file_name, tf.file_type, tf.file_size, tf.file_desc, tf.upload_time, COALESCE(t.teacher_name, s.student_name, '未知用户') AS upload_user_name FROM topic_file tf LEFT JOIN user_account ua ON tf.upload_user_id = ua.user_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON ua.related_id = t.teacher_id AND ua.role = 'TEACHER' LEFT JOIN student s ON ua.related_id = s.student_id AND ua.role = 'STUDENT' WHERE tf.topic_id = #{topicId} AND tf.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY tf.upload_time DESC
